label: Starting pawn count
description: Abstract base for starting pawn count entries used in configured starting pawn lists. Tracks how many pawns of a type are required and whether they must be present from the start.

count.label: Count
count.description: Number of pawns of this type to include. Defaults to 1.

requiredAtStart.label: Required at start
requiredAtStart.description: When true, this pawn type is always included in the starting party and cannot be removed. Defaults to false.
